name: button
title: Button
description: A CTA pill button — accent-filled (primary) or bordered (ghost). It fades and rises in on the house entrance, then plays an optional deterministic click-dip at pressFrame: a quick scale down to 0.94 and back that reads as a press.
pickWhen: a CTA needs to read as clickable — landing button, end-card action. Pair `pressFrame` with `cursor` for product demos.
